title: zieria cytisoides var. involucrata
intro: Zieria cytisoides var. involucrata is a variety of the Zieria cytisoides plant, a native Australian shrub that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zieria cytisoides var. involucrata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its use in treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
